root.rep_text: แบบรายงานที่ 7 - แบบรายงานฐานะสภาพคล่องสุทธิ
root.sql:
SELECT sc_rep_scq_form7.operate_date, sc_rep_scq_form7.item_type, sc_rep_scq_form7.item_desc, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_now, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_y1g_y5 + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_y5g_y10 + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_y10g as time_y1g_y5 , sc_rep_scq_form7.time_noterm as time_noterm, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_1m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_2m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_3m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_4m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_5m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_6m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_7m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_8m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_9m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_10m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_11m, sc_rep_scq_form7.time_12m
, ( sc_rep_scq_form7.time_now + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_y1g_y5 + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_y5g_y10 + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_y10g + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_noterm + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_1m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_2m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_3m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_4m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_5m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_6m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_7m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_8m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_9m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_10m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_11m + sc_rep_scq_form7.time_12m ) as total_amount
FROM sc_rep_scq_form7 where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ order by sc_rep_scq_form7.item_type
